# Port target: `eslint-plugin-playwright`

| | |
|---|---|
| Upstream repo | https://github.com/mskelton/eslint-plugin-playwright |
| Submodule | `upstream/eslint-plugin-playwright` @ `v2.10.4` |
| Baseline npm version | `2.10.4` |
| License | MIT |
| Oxlint native support | none — port target |
| Rules to port | 58 |

## Rules

| # | Rule | Description | Docs |
|---|------|-------------|------|
| 1 | `consistent-spacing-between-blocks` | Enforces a blank line between Playwright test blocks (e.g., test, test.step, test.beforeEach, etc.). | [docs](https://github.com/mskelton/eslint-plugin-playwright/blob/main/docs/rules/consistent-spacing-between-blocks.md) |
| 2 | `expect-expect` | Enforce assertion to be made in a test body | [docs](https://github.com/mskelton/eslint-plugin-playwright/blob/main/docs/rules/expect-expect.md) |
| 3 | `max-expects` | Enforces a maximum number assertion calls in a test body | [docs](https://github.com/mskelton/eslint-plugin-playwright/blob/main/docs/rules/max-expects.md) |
| 4 | `max-nested-describe` | Enforces a maximum depth to nested describe calls | [docs](https://github.com/mskelton/eslint-plugin-playwright/blob/main/docs/rules/max-nested-describe.md) |
| 5 | `missing-playwright-await` | Identify false positives when async Playwright APIs are not properly awaited. | [docs](https://github.com/mskelton/eslint-plugin-playwright/blob/main/docs/rules/missing-playwright-await.md) |
| 6 | `no-commented-out-tests` | Disallow commented out tests | [docs](https://github.com/mskelton/eslint-plugin-playwright/blob/main/docs/rules/no-commented-out-tests.md) |
| 7 | `no-conditional-expect` | Disallow calling `expect` conditionally | [docs](https://github.com/mskelton/eslint-plugin-playwright/blob/main/docs/rules/no-conditional-expect.md) |
| 8 | `no-conditional-in-test` | Disallow conditional logic in tests | [docs](https://github.com/mskelton/eslint-plugin-playwright/blob/main/docs/rules/no-conditional-in-test.md) |
| 9 | `no-duplicate-hooks` | Disallow duplicate setup and teardown hooks | [docs](https://github.com/mskelton/eslint-plugin-playwright/blob/main/docs/rules/no-duplicate-hooks.md) |
| 10 | `no-duplicate-slow` | Disallow multiple `test.slow()` calls in the same test | [docs](https://github.com/mskelton/eslint-plugin-playwright/blob/main/docs/rules/no-duplicate-slow.md) |
| 11 | `no-element-handle` | The use of ElementHandle is discouraged, use Locator instead | [docs](https://github.com/mskelton/eslint-plugin-playwright/blob/main/docs/rules/no-element-handle.md) |
| 12 | `no-eval` | The use of `page.$eval` and `page.$$eval` are discouraged, use `locator.evaluate` or `locator.evaluateAll` instead | [docs](https://github.com/mskelton/eslint-plugin-playwright/blob/main/docs/rules/no-eval.md) |
| 13 | `no-focused-test` | Prevent usage of `.only()` focus test annotation | [docs](https://github.com/mskelton/eslint-plugin-playwright/blob/main/docs/rules/no-focused-test.md) |
| 14 | `no-force-option` | Prevent usage of `{ force: true }` option. | [docs](https://github.com/mskelton/eslint-plugin-playwright/blob/main/docs/rules/no-force-option.md) |
| 15 | `no-get-by-title` | Disallows the usage of getByTitle() | [docs](https://github.com/mskelton/eslint-plugin-playwright/blob/main/docs/rules/no-get-by-title.md) |
| 16 | `no-hooks` | Disallow setup and teardown hooks | [docs](https://github.com/mskelton/eslint-plugin-playwright/blob/main/docs/rules/no-hooks.md) |
| 17 | `no-nested-step` | Disallow nested `test.step()` methods | [docs](https://github.com/mskelton/eslint-plugin-playwright/blob/main/docs/rules/no-nested-step.md) |
| 18 | `no-networkidle` | Prevent usage of the networkidle option | [docs](https://github.com/mskelton/eslint-plugin-playwright/blob/main/docs/rules/no-networkidle.md) |
| 19 | `no-nth-methods` | Disallow usage of nth methods | [docs](https://github.com/mskelton/eslint-plugin-playwright/blob/main/docs/rules/no-nth-methods.md) |
| 20 | `no-page-pause` | Prevent usage of page.pause() | [docs](https://github.com/mskelton/eslint-plugin-playwright/blob/main/docs/rules/no-page-pause.md) |
| 21 | `no-raw-locators` | Disallows the usage of raw locators | [docs](https://github.com/mskelton/eslint-plugin-playwright/blob/main/docs/rules/no-raw-locators.md) |
| 22 | `no-restricted-locators` | Disallows the usage of specific locator methods | [docs](https://github.com/mskelton/eslint-plugin-playwright/blob/main/docs/rules/no-restricted-locators.md) |
| 23 | `no-restricted-matchers` | Disallow specific matchers & modifiers | [docs](https://github.com/mskelton/eslint-plugin-playwright/blob/main/docs/rules/no-restricted-matchers.md) |
| 24 | `no-restricted-roles` | Disallows the usage of specific roles in getByRole() | [docs](https://github.com/mskelton/eslint-plugin-playwright/blob/main/docs/rules/no-restricted-roles.md) |
| 25 | `no-skipped-test` | Prevent usage of the `.skip()` skip test annotation. | [docs](https://github.com/mskelton/eslint-plugin-playwright/blob/main/docs/rules/no-skipped-test.md) |
| 26 | `no-slowed-test` | Prevent usage of the `.slow()` slow test annotation. | [docs](https://github.com/mskelton/eslint-plugin-playwright/blob/main/docs/rules/no-slowed-test.md) |
| 27 | `no-standalone-expect` | Disallow using `expect` outside of `test` blocks | [docs](https://github.com/mskelton/eslint-plugin-playwright/blob/main/docs/rules/no-standalone-expect.md) |
| 28 | `no-unsafe-references` | Prevent unsafe variable references in page.evaluate() and page.addInitScript() | [docs](https://github.com/mskelton/eslint-plugin-playwright/blob/main/docs/rules/no-unsafe-references.md) |
| 29 | `no-unused-locators` | Disallow usage of page locators that are not used | [docs](https://github.com/mskelton/eslint-plugin-playwright/blob/main/docs/rules/no-unused-locators.md) |
| 30 | `no-useless-await` | Disallow unnecessary awaits for Playwright methods | [docs](https://github.com/mskelton/eslint-plugin-playwright/blob/main/docs/rules/no-useless-await.md) |
| 31 | `no-useless-not` | Disallow usage of 'not' matchers when a more specific matcher exists | [docs](https://github.com/mskelton/eslint-plugin-playwright/blob/main/docs/rules/no-useless-not.md) |
| 32 | `no-wait-for-navigation` | Prevent usage of page.waitForNavigation() | [docs](https://github.com/mskelton/eslint-plugin-playwright/blob/main/docs/rules/no-wait-for-navigation.md) |
| 33 | `no-wait-for-selector` | Prevent usage of page.waitForSelector() | [docs](https://github.com/mskelton/eslint-plugin-playwright/blob/main/docs/rules/no-wait-for-selector.md) |
| 34 | `no-wait-for-timeout` | Prevent usage of page.waitForTimeout() | [docs](https://github.com/mskelton/eslint-plugin-playwright/blob/main/docs/rules/no-wait-for-timeout.md) |
| 35 | `prefer-comparison-matcher` | Suggest using the built-in comparison matchers | [docs](https://github.com/mskelton/eslint-plugin-playwright/blob/main/docs/rules/prefer-comparison-matcher.md) |
| 36 | `prefer-equality-matcher` | Suggest using the built-in equality matchers | [docs](https://github.com/mskelton/eslint-plugin-playwright/blob/main/docs/rules/prefer-equality-matcher.md) |
| 37 | `prefer-hooks-in-order` | Prefer having hooks in a consistent order | [docs](https://github.com/mskelton/eslint-plugin-playwright/blob/main/docs/rules/prefer-hooks-in-order.md) |
| 38 | `prefer-hooks-on-top` | Suggest having hooks before any test cases | [docs](https://github.com/mskelton/eslint-plugin-playwright/blob/main/docs/rules/prefer-hooks-on-top.md) |
| 39 | `prefer-locator` | Suggest locators over page methods | [docs](https://github.com/mskelton/eslint-plugin-playwright/blob/main/docs/rules/prefer-locator.md) |
| 40 | `prefer-lowercase-title` | Enforce lowercase test names | [docs](https://github.com/mskelton/eslint-plugin-playwright/blob/main/docs/rules/prefer-lowercase-title.md) |
| 41 | `prefer-native-locators` | Prefer native locator functions | [docs](https://github.com/mskelton/eslint-plugin-playwright/blob/main/docs/rules/prefer-native-locators.md) |
| 42 | `prefer-strict-equal` | Suggest using `toStrictEqual()` | [docs](https://github.com/mskelton/eslint-plugin-playwright/blob/main/docs/rules/prefer-strict-equal.md) |
| 43 | `prefer-to-be` | Suggest using `toBe()` for primitive literals | [docs](https://github.com/mskelton/eslint-plugin-playwright/blob/main/docs/rules/prefer-to-be.md) |
| 44 | `prefer-to-contain` | Suggest using toContain() | [docs](https://github.com/mskelton/eslint-plugin-playwright/blob/main/docs/rules/prefer-to-contain.md) |
| 45 | `prefer-to-have-count` | Suggest using `toHaveCount()` | [docs](https://github.com/mskelton/eslint-plugin-playwright/blob/main/docs/rules/prefer-to-have-count.md) |
| 46 | `prefer-to-have-length` | Suggest using `toHaveLength()` | [docs](https://github.com/mskelton/eslint-plugin-playwright/blob/main/docs/rules/prefer-to-have-length.md) |
| 47 | `prefer-web-first-assertions` | Prefer web first assertions | [docs](https://github.com/mskelton/eslint-plugin-playwright/blob/main/docs/rules/prefer-web-first-assertions.md) |
| 48 | `require-hook` | Require setup and teardown code to be within a hook | [docs](https://github.com/mskelton/eslint-plugin-playwright/blob/main/docs/rules/require-hook.md) |
| 49 | `require-soft-assertions` | Require all assertions to use `expect.soft` | [docs](https://github.com/mskelton/eslint-plugin-playwright/blob/main/docs/rules/require-soft-assertions.md) |
| 50 | `require-tags` | Require test blocks to have tags | [docs](https://github.com/mskelton/eslint-plugin-playwright/blob/main/docs/rules/require-tags.md) |
| 51 | `require-to-pass-timeout` | Require a timeout option for `toPass()` | [docs](https://github.com/mskelton/eslint-plugin-playwright/blob/main/docs/rules/require-to-pass-timeout.md) |
| 52 | `require-to-throw-message` | Require a message for `toThrow()` | [docs](https://github.com/mskelton/eslint-plugin-playwright/blob/main/docs/rules/require-to-throw-message.md) |
| 53 | `require-top-level-describe` | Require test cases and hooks to be inside a `test.describe` block | [docs](https://github.com/mskelton/eslint-plugin-playwright/blob/main/docs/rules/require-top-level-describe.md) |
| 54 | `valid-describe-callback` | Enforce valid `describe()` callback | [docs](https://github.com/mskelton/eslint-plugin-playwright/blob/main/docs/rules/valid-describe-callback.md) |
| 55 | `valid-expect` | Enforce valid `expect()` usage | [docs](https://github.com/mskelton/eslint-plugin-playwright/blob/main/docs/rules/valid-expect.md) |
| 56 | `valid-expect-in-promise` | Require promises that have expectations in their chain to be valid | [docs](https://github.com/mskelton/eslint-plugin-playwright/blob/main/docs/rules/valid-expect-in-promise.md) |
| 57 | `valid-test-tags` | Enforce valid tag format in Playwright test blocks and titles | [docs](https://github.com/mskelton/eslint-plugin-playwright/blob/main/docs/rules/valid-test-tags.md) |
| 58 | `valid-title` | Enforce valid titles | [docs](https://github.com/mskelton/eslint-plugin-playwright/blob/main/docs/rules/valid-title.md) |
